tactical_shape: controlled midfield in the early stages
structured attacking play with creativity between the lines
used wide pressure and repeated attacks against a low block
standout_players: Daniel Muñoz — broke the deadlock with his second goal in as many games
Lionel Mpasi (opposition keeper) repeatedly denied Colombia
Luis Díaz had two goals ruled out for offside and remained a threat
James Rodríguez forced a good save early
Johan Mojica tested the keeper from distance
Jhon Arias was denied early and later missed the rebound chance
home_read.momentum: Back-to-back win secures a place in the knockout rounds, and Colombia can still top the group if they avoid defeat against Portugal.

tactical_shape: settled into a low block after an early spell
tightened up the midfield after a hydration break
back five defended deep for most of the match
midfield three protected the defence, with Yoane Wissa linking to a lone centre-forward
standout_players: Lionel Mpasi — described by Sébastien Desabre as excellent; made a string of saves
Noah Sadiki — prodigious engine after coming on at half-time, helped prevent fatigue in the midfield shield
Edo Kayembe flashed the first shot just wide
Nathanaël Mbuku drew a late save from Camilo Vargas
away_read.momentum: Despite being broken late, Congo DR showed superb resistance and defiance; a win over Uzbekistan in the final game would almost certainly take them through.
